# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdNamespaceAuthzPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace_name>
spec:
  defaultAction: ALLOW
  selector: {}
  authorizationRules:
    - actions:
        - READ
        - WRITE
        - DELETE
      resources:
        - services
        - secrets
        - configmaps
    - actions:
        - GRPC_CALL
    - actions:
        - HTTP_CONNECT
        - HTTP_GET
        - HTTP_POST
        - HTTP_PUT
        - HTTP_PATCH
        - HTTP_DELETE
        - HTTP_OPTIONS
        - HTTP_HEAD
  exemptNamespaces: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdServiceAccountAuthzPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace_name>
spec:
  defaultAction: ALLOW
  selector: {}
  authorizationRules:
    - actions:
        - GRPC_CALL
    - actions:
        - HTTP_CONNECT
        - HTTP_GET
        - HTTP_POST
        - HTTP_PUT
        - HTTP_PATCH
        - HTTP_DELETE
        - HTTP_OPTIONS
        - HTTP_HEAD
  exemptNamespaces: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdPodAuthzPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <namespace_name>
spec:
  defaultAction: ALLOW
  selector: {}
  authorizationRules:
    - actions:
        - GRPC_CALL
    - actions:
        - HTTP_CONNECT
        - HTTP_GET
        - HTTP_POST
        - HTTP_PUT
        - HTTP_PATCH
        - HTTP_DELETE
        - HTTP_OPTIONS
        - HTTP_HEAD
  exemptNamespaces: []
```
